rust.symptoms: Orange-brown to reddish-brown pustules on leaves, stems, and spikes
rust.solution: Spray propiconazole or tebuconazole fungicide; use resistant varieties

smut.symptoms: Black powdery mass replacing grains in the ear
smut.cause: Seed-borne fungus (Ustilago tritici for loose smut)
smut.solution: Use treated seeds (carbendazim or carboxin) before sowing; rogue infected plants

powdery_mildew.symptoms: White powdery patches on leaves and stems
powdery_mildew.cause: Fungal infection in cool humid climate (Blumeria graminis)

rice.soil: Clay or loamy soil with good water retention

blast.symptoms: Diamond or spindle-shaped spots with gray center and brown margins on leaves; neck blast causes whiteheads
blast.solution: Spray tricyclazole or isoprothiolane; use resistant varieties

bacterial_blight.symptoms: Yellowing and drying of leaves starting from margins; water-soaked lesions
bacterial_blight.solution: Use copper oxychloride or streptocycline; plant resistant varieties

sheath_blight.symptoms: Oval or irregular brown lesions on leaf sheaths near water line
sheath_blight.solution: Spray validamycin or hexaconazole; maintain proper spacing and avoid excess nitrogen

early_blight.symptoms: Dark brown spots with concentric rings on older leaves

late_blight.symptoms: Water-soaked dark spots on leaves turning brown; white fungal growth on underside in humid conditions
late_blight.solution: Use metalaxyl or ridomil MZ; destroy infected debris

leaf_curl.symptoms: Leaves curl upward, become yellow and stunted
leaf_curl.cause: Virus (Tomato leaf curl virus) spread by whiteflies
leaf_curl.solution: Control whiteflies with neem oil or imidacloprid; use resistant varieties

late_blight.symptoms: Dark brown to black patches on leaves with white fungal growth on underside
late_blight.solution: Use metalaxyl or mancozeb-based spray; destroy cull piles

early_blight.symptoms: Circular dark brown spots with concentric rings on older leaves

leaf_blight.symptoms: Large elongated grayish lesions on leaves
leaf_blight.cause: Fungal infection (Exserohilum turcicum or Bipolaris maydis)

rust.symptoms: Reddish-brown to orange pustules on leaves
rust.solution: Use triazole fungicide spray if severe

boll_rot.symptoms: Rotting of cotton bolls with discoloration
boll_rot.solution: Improve drainage; spray carbendazim or mancozeb

leaf_curl.symptoms: Upward or downward curling of leaves with vein thickening
leaf_curl.solution: Control whiteflies with neem oil or insecticides; rogue infected plants

purple_blotch.symptoms: Purple to brown spots with concentric rings on leaves

anthracnose.symptoms: Sunken dark spots with pinkish spore masses on fruits

leaf_spot.symptoms: Small circular brown spots on leaves

rust.symptoms: Brown to reddish lesions or pustules on leaves

bacterial_pustule.symptoms: Small raised yellowish-green spots turning brown
bacterial_pustule.solution: Use resistant varieties; avoid overhead irrigation

red_rot.symptoms: Red discoloration with white patches inside the stem
red_rot.solution: Use disease-free setts; treat setts with carbendazim

smut.symptoms: Black whip-like structure emerging from the top
smut.solution: Use resistant varieties; rogue infected plants

white_rust.symptoms: White blister-like pustules on leaves and stems

alternaria_blight.symptoms: Dark brown to black spots with concentric rings on leaves

tikka_disease.symptoms: Brown to black leaf spots (early and late leaf spot)

rust.symptoms: Orange to reddish-brown pustules on leaves

leaf_rust.symptoms: Brown to orange pustules on leaves

panama_disease.symptoms: Yellowing and wilting of leaves starting from older ones; vascular discoloration
panama_disease.solution: Use resistant varieties (e.g., Cavendish); avoid infected soil

black_sigatoka.symptoms: Dark streaks turning into large necrotic spots on leaves

anthracnose.symptoms: Black spots on leaves, flowers, and fruits; fruit rot
anthracnose.solution: Spray carbendazim or mancozeb before flowering

powdery_mildew.symptoms: White powdery coating on flowers and young leaves
powdery_mildew.solution: Use sulfur fungicide or wettable sulfur

downy_mildew.symptoms: Yellow patches on upper leaf surface with white downy growth underneath

powdery_mildew.symptoms: White powdery growth on leaves, shoots, and berries

black_rot.symptoms: V-shaped yellow lesions on leaf margins; black veins
black_rot.solution: Use disease-free seeds; hot water seed treatment

downy_mildew.symptoms: Greyish fungal growth on underside of leaves

black_rot.symptoms: Yellowing starting from leaf margins with black veins

club_root.solution: Maintain soil pH above 7.0 (lime the soil); crop rotation

powdery_mildew.symptoms: White powdery coating on leaves and pods
powdery_mildew.solution: Spray sulfur fungicide or wettable sulfur

root_rot.symptoms: Root decay, yellowing, and wilting of plants
root_rot.solution: Improve drainage; seed treatment with fungicide

rust.symptoms: Orange to brown pustules on leaves and stems

wilt.symptoms: Sudden wilting and yellowing of plants
